calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-14-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Appellant/Defendant, Velma Clarise Gay, the moving party, in Pro Per, is NOT present.
Respondent/Plaintiff, Lily Yu, the opposing party, in Pro Per, is present. Witness, Zhuo Cheng Yu, is present.

This cause comes on regularly for Trial De Novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Appellant/Defendant, Velma Clarise Gay, is not present, thus no testimony nor evidence is introduced.

Respondent/Plaintiff, Lily Yu, testifies on her own behalf. Witness, Zhuo Cheng Yu, testifies for respondent, Ms. Yu. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1 - Lease Agreement between plaintiff and defendant
Exhibit 2 - Lily Yu's Testimony
Exhibit 3 - Pictures of broken door, lock, and damaged wall
Exhibit 4 - Text Messages between plaintiff and defendant
Exhibit 5 - Receipt from Pest Control
Exhibit 6 - Pictures of damaged carpet
Exhibit 7 - Defendant's Application to Plaintiff's unit
Exhibit 8 - Receipt for service on initial claim ($40.00)

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court orders matter submitted and takes matter under submission. All introduced documentary evidence from Respondent/Plaintiff are returned to the offering party, Lily Yu. The envelope containing documentary evidence from Appellant/Defendant, Velma Clarise Gay, are remained with the case file. Parties are to be notified of the decision via mail. Judge: Honorable JOSEPH M. QUINN; Clerk: C. Cheng; Reporter: Not Reported. (D606)
